reason: Development preparation exposed nine early ENS daily gaps. The frozen rule says an incomplete target is NO_ACTION while the cross-section remains valid with at least 20 rankable targets; the implementation incorrectly failed the whole stage and shifted by observed rows instead of UTC calendar days.
changes: Reindex each symbol to a complete UTC daily calendar before 7/56/70/84-day shifts.
Require an explicit contiguous 85-day OHLCV completeness flag for a target to be rankable.
Treat individual missing bars as target NO_ACTION and fail stage quality only if a decision has fewer than 20 complete targets.
Preserve all frozen symbols, signal, costs, stages, thresholds, baselines and conclusion gates.
